subject: F13 GREEN: wire --mmap-size into hsim
description: Add --mmap-size SPEC to p_run, p_archive (already has), p_profile, p_estimate. Replace 3 hardcoded tempfile.mkstemp(dir="/dev/shm") + os.truncate sites with tools.hsim_shm.allocate(). Consolidate _SHM_SIZE (line 660) into _DEFAULT_MMAP_SIZE.
